text.title: Client Handover Package Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the handover-package artefact. Pre-final-invoice gate rejects a close without a valid package.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "chp-acme-2026-05", "client": "ACME", "engagement_end": "2026-05-23", "sections": {"scope_summary": "Built and shipped /v2/quote endpoint with Go shadow router; migrated from Python service over 8 weeks.", "runbook": "Start: docker compose up; Stop: docker compose down; Debug: tail logs at /var/log/quote.log; rotate flags via LaunchDarkly UI.", "architecture": "Diagram in docs/architecture.png; Go service exposes :8080, Python remains on :8081 until cutover complete.", "ops_surface": "Datadog dashboard ACME-quote; alerts to #ops"}, "credentials": [{"name": "datadog_api_key", "vault_path": "op://faion.net/ACME/datadog", "rotation_date": "2026-05-22", "acknowledged_by": "successor@acme.com", "acknowledged_at": "2026-05-23"}], "open_items": [{"title": "Remove Python service", "severity": "medium", "effort": "M", "blast_radius": 3, "next_step": "Schedule for sprint 27"}], "successor_email": "successor@acme.com", "support_window": {"days": 30, "scope": "bug-fixes only", "sla_hours": 24, "channel": "slack #consultant-handover", "after_window": "hourly billing at $200/h"}, "signoff": {"consultant_signed_by": "ruslan@faion.net", "consultant_signed_at": "2026-05-23", "client_signed_by": "successor@acme.com", "client_signed_at": "2026-05-23"}, "verdict": "archive-and-close", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }

example.note: artefact_id missing chp- prefix; engagement_end not ISO; sections missing 3 of 4 required + too short; credentials empty (likely r2 violation); open_item missing fields + severity not in enum (r3); successor team-alias (r4); support_window malformed (r6); signoff empty (r5); verdict impossible; version/date malformed.

antipattern.description: credentials[] entries missing rotation_date OR acknowledged_by.
antipattern.reason: r2 violation; credential not actually transferred.

antipattern.description: signoff missing one of the two parties (consultant or client).

antipattern.reason: r6 violation; unbounded window is scope-creep.
